description: Style NoteCut from soft and stretchy knit cotton fabric, this innerwear t-shirt is an essential one simply cannot do without.  Its pure cotton composition guarantees comfort during summer months while its knit structure contours your torso. Available to you at a price that does not burn a hole in your pocket this piece makes for a great buy.Product DetailsWhite single jersey knit T-shirt, crew neck with rib knit binding, short sleeves, printed inner branding, brand badge on left sleeveMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash warm with like coloursSize and FitRegular riseThe model (height 6' and shoulder 18'') is wearing a size M
